<![CDATA[
.GridViewSearchContainer {width: 200px; display: inline-block; box-sizing: border-box; vertical-align: middle;}
.GridViewSearchInput {border: 1px solid #7f9db9; font-family: Tahoma; font-size: 11px; height: 16px; outline: 0 none; padding: 0 5px; width: 165px;}
.GridViewSearchButton {background: url(data:image/png;base64,); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: center center; width: 15px; height: 15px; cursor: pointer; border: 0; outline: none; padding-right: 10px;}
